title: Sun-Up
writer: Joseph Farnham, Edmund Goulding, Arthur F. Statter
actors: Pauline Starke, Conrad Nagel, Lucille La Verne
plot: When she hears her boy has been killed in WWI a vengeful Kentucky hills mother shelters a deserter as a protest.When the boy returns she asks him to kill the deserter who she learns is the son of a murderous revenue agent.
